channel.title: Win32 on Bead隨筆
channel.description: Recent content in Win32 on Bead隨筆

item.title: [Win32筆記] 建立視窗 #1
item.description: Win32 參考 : MSDN Get Started with Win32 and C++ 建立entry point, WinMain() // int WINAPI wWinMain(HINSTANCE hInstance, HINSTANCE, PWSTR pCmdLine, int nCmdShow) // wWinMain為UniCode模式，WinMain為Ansi模式 int CALLBACK WinMain( HINSTANCE hInstance, HINSTANCE
